5.name: Employee Reward & Recognition
5.note: Minor benefit if infrequent — FBT exempt

7.name: Promotional Items
7.note: FBT exempt — must go via Marketing Branch

9.name: Entertainment & Hospitality FBT
9.note: Social function — FBT applies. All costs including venue, food, entertainment.

11.name: Training & Development
11.note: External training — not a hospitality account

12.name: Conferences & Seminar Fees
12.note: Registration fees only. Travel and meals are separate accounts.

14.name: Entertainment & Hospitality Non-FBT
14.note: Work-related meals at conference — on-site employees only

15.name: Entertainment & Hospitality Non-FBT
15.note: Refreshment only — nibbles and morning tea at farewell

17.name: Entertainment & Hospitality FBT
17.note: Off-site or elaborate meal → 73511. Apply Reason H 4 factors: purpose, food type, timing, location.

18.name: Entertainment & Hospitality Non-FBT
18.note: Non work-related meal entertainment for guest — 73512

20.name: Entertainment & Hospitality FBT
20.note: Management team lunch — likely off-site and elaborate. Apply Reason H.

21.name: Entertainment & Hospitality FBT
21.note: Depends on food and venue — apply Reason H 4 factors to determine 73511 vs 73512

23.name: Internal Catering — FBT
23.note: LEC/Logan Metro InSports — FBT incurs. Invoice must detail purpose, attendees, food/drink.

24.name: Internal Catering — Non-FBT
24.note: LEC/Logan Metro InSports — no FBT. Invoice must detail purpose, attendees, food/drink.
